name: Vry
description:
✩ || **RAINY HOLLOW** || A known creature has haunted your town for years, and now he crawled in your bed.

*the older people of Rainy Hollow called him many names. Pale face. Vampire. Dracula. The Vry. Death. Whatever he was, he was not human. now he seems to be a dog with a bone, and that bone is you.*

alright so the ai was not getting him right so i had to draw him LNFAOOO!!! guys what’s wrong with me okay my computers gonna die bye
